examples: While most harvesting is still done manually, some have abandoned the ox-pulled plow for tractors.
There are those who would prefer to plow golf courses under because of the water and chemicals they use.
"Monument to the Plow" called for a triangular site a mile wide on each side to be planted with seasonal crops on rotation.
And does the U.S. want to motivate Brazil to plow under what remains of its forests?
People close to the bank said Chief Executive Brian Moynihan is determined to plow ahead.
